subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Istiqamat
subcodes.first_line: We counsel you, O servants of the All-Merciful, to trustworthiness and truthfulness and fidelity, and to fear of God, the Mighty, the All-Wise [3.5s]... ...Can it be possible that after the dawning of the day-star of Thy Testament above the horizon of Thy Most Great Tablet
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوصیکم یا عباد الرحمن بالامانه و الصدق و الوفاء و بتقوی الله العزیز الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
